arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Kendra FAQ.

created_at.description: The date and time when the Kendra FAQ was created.

description.description: A brief description of the Kendra FAQ.

error_message.description: Error message if there was an issue with the Kendra FAQ.

file_format.description: The format of the file used for the Kendra FAQ.

id.description: The unique identifier of the Kendra FAQ.

language_code.description: The language code of the Kendra FAQ content.

name.description: The name of the Kendra FAQ.

role_arn.description: The ARN of the IAM role used by Kendra FAQ.

s3_path.description: The S3 path where the Kendra FAQ file is stored.

status.description: The current status of the Kendra FAQ.

tags.description: A map of tags associated with the Kendra FAQ.

updated_at.description: The date and time when the Kendra FAQ was last updated.
